title: Brazilian Steak Skewers
description: A delicious and easy-to-make dish featuring marinated steak and vegetables grilled to perfection on skewers.

ingredients.name: Brazilian Seasoning
ingredients.notes: Available in most grocery stores or online

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together Brazilian seasoning and olive oil.
Add sliced steak, onion, bell pepper, and zucchini to the bowl. Toss to coat with marinade.
Thread steak and vegetables onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until steak reaches an internal temperature of 135°F for medium-rare.
Let skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
